audit_result.proof_trace: Validation checks execute in wrong order: expensive getBlockSlotState (check 7, line 101) runs before cheap signature verification (check 5, line 129). Spec mandates check 5 before check 7 to minimize wasted work on invalid messages.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker floods P2P network with data column sidecars having valid headers but invalid proposer signatures. Each message triggers expensive state lookups before rejection, exhausting node resources and degrading network performance.

PROP-6a4369e9-post-002.text: After gossip validation acceptance, sidecar must have passed all REJECT checks in order.
